title: Synthetic OCR Required Layout Benchmark Paper
abstract: This benchmark paper simulates a visually dominated two column layout whose embedded text is too unreliable to trust without OCR normalization.
paragraphs: Severe image coverage can require OCR even when the paper is still routed as layout complex.
The benchmark verifies that OCR becomes mandatory before provider comparison continues.
references: [1] Ivan Sutherland. Sketchpad: A Man-Machine Graphical Communication System.
